notes: Carrying a baton in public in the UK is generally illegal without a lawful reason.
Kubotans can be legal as simple keychains but may be illegal if designed or intended as weapons
Self-defence keychains may be legal if they are ordinary items, but weapon-style designs can be treated as offensive weapons.
Carrying a sword in public is only legal with a valid reason such as work, ceremony, or transport.
Tasers are restricted to authorised use and are not legal for civilians to own or carry in the UK.
Pepper spray is a prohibited weapon in the UK for civilians
Switchblades are prohibited knives in the UK and cannot be owned or imported.
Butterfly knives are banned in the UK and are illegal to possess or import.
Stun guns are prohibited weapons in the UK and are illegal for civilian possession.
Brass knuckles are banned weapons in the UK and cannot be owned or carried.
